heading: Essential Tools
body: A hammer and saw are the two most important tools for base construction. Keep them in your main inventory rather than a bag — they are needed constantly during building. Screwdrivers are required for door hinges and some electrical tasks. Kitchen knives serve multiple roles: food preparation, crafting spears, and close-combat backup.

heading: Tool Condition and Repair
body: All tools degrade with use. Check the condition bar in your inventory panel regularly. Damaged tools operate at reduced efficiency and will eventually break. Metalworking skill allows repair of metal tools. Always keep a spare hammer and saw in your base stash — running out of tools mid-construction wastes materials and time.

heading: Vehicles as Tool Storage
body: Vehicle trunks provide large portable storage for tools and construction materials. Keep a dedicated vehicle near your base stocked with building supplies for quick access. Vehicles also offer an emergency escape route when your base is overwhelmed. Learning to hotwire vehicles eliminates dependence on keys and greatly expands your transport options.

heading: Improvised and Crafted Tools
body: A stone knife can be crafted from two small stones with no skill or tools required. It functions as a basic cutting tool and emergency weapon. Stones are found along roadsides, driveways, and river banks. A notched wooden plank crafted from a branch and stone knife can start a fire without a lighter — essential if your ignition source runs out.
